Formula One Blitz Highlights - Louis Vuitton Australian Grand Prix. The Australian GP was the chaotic season opener, won by McLarens Lando Norris from pole position after a dramatic race marked by mixed weather and multiple safety cars
Formula One Blitz Highlights - Heineken Chinese Grand Prix. Oscar Piastri won the Chinese main race from pole position, leading a McLaren one-two finish ahead of teammate Lando Norris.
Formula One Blitz Highlights - Lenovo Japanese Grand Prix. The Japanese GP was won by Max Verstappen, who fended off a race-long challenge from the two McLarens of Lando Norris and Oscar Piastri.
Formula One Blitz Highlights - Bahrain Grand Prix. Oscar Piastri of McLaren converted his pole position to a victory, ahead of George Russell of Mercedes and Piastris teammate Lando Norris.
Formula One Blitz Highlights - STC Saudi Arabian Grand Prix. Oscar Piastri won the 2025 Saudi Arabian GP, taking the WDC lead for McLaren. Verstappen took P2 despite a 5s penalty, with Leclerc P3.

Formula One Blitz Highlights - Crypto.com Miami Grand Prix. Piastri storms to victory at the 2025 Miami GP, leading a McLaren 1-2 with Norris. Russell takes third as Verstappen slips to fourth after losing the lead on lap 14.
Formula One Blitz Highlights - AWS Gran Premio Del Made in Italy E DellEmilia-Romagna. Verstappen triumphs at Imola, winning the Emilia-Romagna GP ahead of Norris and Piastri.

Formula One Blitz Highlights - Grand Prix De Monaco. Norris won from pole, holding off Leclerc. Piastri P3. Verstappen P4 after a late tire gamble failed. Norriss win cut the title lead to 3 points in a strategic race.

Formula One Blitz Highlights - Aramco Gran Premio De Espana. Oscar Piastri controlled the race from pole position, leading a strong showing by McLaren. Lando Norris finished just a few seconds behind.

Formula One Blitz Highlights - Pirelli Grand Prix Du Canada. Russell claims pole-to-flag win in Montreal, with Verstappen second and rookie Antonelli third. Russell nabbed fastest lap, McLarens Norris and Piastri collide late.
Formula One Blitz Highlights - MSC Cruises Austrian Grand Prix. Norris won at the Red Bull Ring. Piastri P2 ensured McLaren dominance on Red Bulls turf with Leclerc finishing P3.
Formula One Blitz Highlights - Qatar Airways British Grand Prix. Norris won a wet-dry home GP. Piastri P2, with Hulkenberg a shock P3 for Sauber.
Formula One Blitz Highlights - Belgian Grand Prix. Piastri won at Spa. Norris P2, Leclerc P3. McLaren extended their Constructors lead significantly over Red Bull.
Formula One Blitz Highlights - Lenovo Hungarian Grand Prix. Lando Norris wins for McLaren, narrowly beating his teammate Oscar Piastri in a thrilling finish, marking McLarens 200th F1 win.
Formula One Blitz Highlights - Heineken Dutch Grand Prix. Piastri spoiled Verstappens home party with a win. Verstappen P2, Hadjar a shock P3 for RB.
Formula One Blitz Highlights - Pirelli Gran Premio DItalia. Verstappen won at Monza. Norris P2, Piastri P3. Ferrari missed the home podium as Leclerc finished P4.
Formula One Blitz Highlights - Qatar Airways Azerbaijan Grand Prix. Verstappen mastered the Baku streets to win from pole. Russell P2, while Carlos Sainz took a maiden Williams podium in P3.
Formula One Blitz Highlights - Singapore Airlines Singapore Grand Prix. George Russell converted pole into a brilliant win. Verstappen took P2 after holding off a fierce charge from Norris (P3).

Formula One Blitz Highlights - MSC Cruises United States Grand Prix. Verstappen dominated the weekend, winning both the Sprint and the Grand Prix. Norris beat Leclerc to P2 after a thrilling late-race duel.

Formula One Blitz Highlights - Gran Premio De La Ciudad De Mexico. Norris won from pole, Leclerc took P2, while Verstappen fought from P5 to P3. Rookie Ollie Bearman secured a career-best P4 for Haas.

Formula One Blitz Highlights - MSC Cruises Grande Premio De Sao Paulo. Norris mastered the rain at Interlagos to win both the Sprint and Grand Prix. Kimi Antonelli took a sensational P2 for Mercedes, with Verstappen P3.

Formula One Blitz Highlights - Heineken Las Vegas Grand Prix. Verstappen won a cold, chaotic night race. Russell and Antonelli followed for a Mercedes 2-3. Both McLarens were disqualified for technical infringements.
Formula One Blitz Highlights - Qatar Airways Qatar Grand Prix. Verstappen won again after a McLaren strategy blunder. Piastri took P2 and Carlos Sainz scored a podium for Williams in P3.
Formula One Blitz Highlights - Etihad Airways Abu Dhabi Grand Prix. Verstappen won the race, but Norriss P3 was enough to secure the World Championship by just 2 points.

S2/E1 of 5. The Springboks arrive in France to begin their World Cup campaign. Not only are they in the toughest pool, but their route to the final will take them up against the top sides in the world.
S2/E2 of 5. The Springboks are reeling from the loss of their star player Malcolm Marx. But they must put setbacks aside as they prepare for their biggest challenge yet: world number one Ireland.

S2/E3 of 5. After a severe dressing-down, the Springboks come together to face their most physically demanding opponent yet: Tonga. But it is hosts France who await the Springboks in the quarter-final.

S2/E4 of 5. With Eben Etzebeth yellow-carded, South Africa must endure an onslaught from the French before claiming a dramatic one-point victory. The Springboks must overcome severe setbacks to find a way to bring hope to a nation.

S2/E5 of 5. In the finale, Bongi Mbonambi is accused of using a racial slur endangering South Africas plans. Now the Springboks must use all their ingenuity and resourcefulness to overcome their historical rivals, New Zealand.

Álvaro Arbeloa. Álvaro Arbeloa played a key role in Clásicos, where he was handed the unenviable task of defending the likes of Leo Messi, Neymar Jr, Alexis Sánchez or David Villa down his flank.
Gareth Bale. Gareth Bale played in LaLiga 11 Clásicos and 15 in total. And despite his numbers against Barcelona not being spectacular, he did score a memorable goal in the 2014 Copa del Rey final.
